Off Calendar Oct-14-2021 Set For Case Management Conference On Jan-12-22 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Discovery Responses And Have Requests For Admission Deemed Admitted
Off Calendar Sep-30-2021 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO's Motion To Compel Discovery Responses And Have Requests For Admission Deemed Admitted is mooted by Judge Schulman's ruling on motion for judgment on the pleadings.

Judge Pro Tem: William Lynn, Clerk: S. Le, Not reported. =(302/JPT)

MOTION FOR JUDGMENT ON THE PLEADINGS
Off Calendar Sep-29-2021 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances via ZOOM
KATHERINE B. BEARMAN, Esq.; (415) 554-4256; Deputy City Attorney, kate.bearman@sfcityatty.org for Defendant CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO

Defendant states to the Court that she checked the Court's docket for the Court's tentative ruling in this matter. Counsel is informed that she needed to go to the court's tentative rulings page and not the court's docket to view the tentative ruling for today's motion. Court informs counsel that the Coourt's tentative ruling is being adopted.

No argument is held. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO'S MOTION FOR JUDGMENT ON THE PLEADINGS.

Grant without leave to amend. No opposition filed.

Order is signed.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman, Clerk: W. Trupek, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano CSR# 8600, email: maria.torreano@gmail.com, Reported. (302/EPS)
